description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Cmder that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. Use a windows-latest job with read permission to repository contents, check out the repository code, add MSBuild to PATH, build Cmder Launcher using build.ps1, pack built files using pack.ps1, and upload multiple artifacts including cmder.zip, cmder.7z, cmder_mini.zip, and hashes.txt.
